story.text:
# ✨ Compose Holon
**🌳(holon) → ⊕(compose) → 🌳🌳(holon-of-holons)**
*vagari · holon · V31*

Compose holons recursively. The holonic primitive is agentprivacy-canonical (V31 from PVM V5.4).

> A holon is a whole that is also a part. Compose them and the city grows another quarter.

*Keywords:* compose · holon · recursion · v31 · arch1
